welcome_title: Welcome to Script Smart Creation System
welcome_desc: I am the Script Orchestrator, able to coordinate all AI experts to complete the entire process from outline to compliance.
welcome_hint: Select a world, tell me your goal or paste a script, and we can get started!
orchestrator_features: Display creation progress and key milestones in real-time;Flow distribution as needed: new creation, continuation, splitting workflow;Coordinate all AI experts and deliver complete results
architect_features: Read/create worldview and story outline;Plan plot twists, suspense, and foreshadowing timeline;Synchronize art style, era environment, and color strategy
writer_features: Gather episode goals, emotions, and key scenes;Write by scenes, automatically leave eye-catching hooks;Auto-save scripts and prompt for missing resources
reviewer_features: Scan real place names, adult content, violence, and other violations;Verify character/outline consistency and quantify scores;Evaluate episode-end hook appeal and suggest improvements
splitter_features: Intelligently split by scene duration while preserving text;Detect differences in existing episodes and ask for handling strategy;Bulk write scripts with split statistics
designer_features: Identify new characters and collect complete settings through Q&A;Organize personality, habits, background, and relationship network;Generate standard character cards to ensure consistency
visualizer_features: Inherit world art style and lock missing character images;Output reference images with 3-views, actions, and expressions;Avoid task conflicts and batch manage generation status
scene_designer_features: Sort new scenes and props list by plot;Extract environment, atmosphere, function, and symbolic meaning;Output structured JSON for subsequent creation
renderer_features: Sync art style and generate visual drafts for missing scenes/props;Provide panoramic and multi-angle views for scenes, 3-views for props;Strictly control task status to prevent duplicate submissions

confirm_reset_session:
⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete drafts and reset?

This will:
1. Delete all local uncommitted files
2. Sync latest data from database
3. Clear current chat history

⚠️ Please ensure important content is saved to database!

Continue?
confirm_new_session:
⚠️ Are you sure you want to create a new session?

This will refresh the page and clear the chat history.

Local files won't be deleted, but chat context will be lost.

Continue?

status_export_done: Export complete, download via CDN link
success_test_passed: Test passed! Full LLM chain verified!
confirm_compress_history:
Compress chat history?

This will:
• Keep key decisions and important info
• Remove redundant dialogue
• Reduce context length to save tokens

Cannot be undone. Continue?

Import "{name}"?

This will overwrite matching data in the current world.
